title: Exhibit
description: Adds blocks to display items better! Includes: Display Panels, Item Displays, Tool Racks and more!
body:
# Exhibit
"For showing what you got"

## What does It add?
Well, it adds 5 new blocks to the game, more on those later.

## Added blocks:
### Obsidian Pedestal: 
Putting an item on displays if spinning above the block

![Diamond Sword on Obsidian Pedestal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0586b26d329176ce11d74e7502a9e120385306a9.png)
### Invisible Display:
Putting an item in displays it spinning in the invisible block

![Diamond Sword on Invisible Display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac9a4aa5d86e450c8403cd178c3d440cc47cdcaa.png)
### Display Panel:
Works like an item frame but displays items bigger and sneak+right-clicking makes it turn 45 degrees

![Diamond Swords on Display Panel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5793dc145e3836279c2b3667fde79d571d534e7.png)
### Tool Racks:
Works like a Display Panel but only some items go in, it has a custom model and there is a tag to make items display as if handheld

![Diamond Swords + Diamond Scythe on Tool Rack ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e601f9bd24d9fee93ee84a2ee940cbe8f0d3b1c.png)
### Item Display:
Putting an item in displays it like an item frame, but items can stack to 64 and it displays the number of items inside if its more then one

![Items on Item Displays](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54974211c2637693ff7d4e83c0fc0afc16f47dba.png)
